description: CompositionChocolate brown round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest printFitting Comfort FitWash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Salute the spirit of Indian yoga in this chocolate brown t-shirt from tantra. Pair this tee with denims and sneakers on a casual day, or with yoga pants for that relaxed look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2', Chest-39.5", Waist-32"
